positive: A stylized, geometric depiction of a crescent moon and cluster of stars merging into a celestial tapestry. The style should be highly detailed modern linework illustration, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets minimalist graphic design. The colors are limited to deep midnight blues, ethereal golds, and stark contrasting blacks. The composition is perfectly centralized, featuring clean, elegant silhouettes of constellations and lunar phases. The overall mood is mystical, calm, and sophisticated. Designed for repeat or single-color screen printing on apparel. High contrast, perfect symmetry, vector artwork quality, clean lines, deep ink bleed effect.
